ddls:
CREATE TABLE "character_encodings" (
  "encoding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoding */,
  "encoding_name" TEXT /* Name of the encoding (e.g., ASCII, EBCDIC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the encoding format */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the encoding is active and can be used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the encoding was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the encoding */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the encoding is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encoding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character mapping */,
  "encoding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the encoding format */,
  "decimal_value" INTEGER /* Decimal representation of the character */,
  "hex_value" TEXT /* Hexadecimal representation of the character */,
  "octal_value" TEXT /* Octal representation of the character */,
  "ebcdic_char" TEXT /* EBCDIC character representation */,
  "ascii_char" TEXT /* ASCII character representation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the mapping */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mapping is valid */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_mappings_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_mappings_encoding_id FOREIGN KEY ("encoding_id") REFERENCES character_encodings ("encoding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_logs" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion operation */,
  "source_encoding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source encoding format */,
  "target_encoding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target encoding format */,
  "input_value" TEXT /* Input value before conversion */,
  "output_value" TEXT /* Output value after conversion */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the conversion was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the conversion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the conversion (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the conversion process */,
  "input_encoding_version" TEXT /* Version of the source encoding used */,
  "output_encoding_version" TEXT /* Version of the target encoding used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_logs_source_encoding_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_encoding_id") REFERENCES character_encodings ("encoding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_logs_target_encoding_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_encoding_id") REFERENCES character_encodings ("encoding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., conversion, lookup) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conversion operation that produced the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error encountered */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the error occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who encountered the error */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the error was encountered */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "stack_trace" TEXT /* Detailed stack trace of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES conversion_logs ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the character class was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the character class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "encoding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the encoding format */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the encoding */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this encoding version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encoding_versions_encoding_id FOREIGN KEY ("encoding_id") REFERENCES character_encodings ("encoding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encoding_compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility record */,
  "source_encoding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source encoding format */,
  "target_encoding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target encoding format */,
  "is_compatible" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the two encodings are compatible */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the compatibility record was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the compatibility record */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the compatibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encoding_compatibility_source_encoding_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_encoding_id") REFERENCES character_encodings ("encoding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encoding_compatibility_target_encoding_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_encoding_id") REFERENCES character_encodings ("encoding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metadata entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)
